claim: Queen Elizabeth II is the current reigning monarch of the United Kingdom.
note: Outdated: she died in 2022; Charles III reigns.

claim: The Space Shuttle is NASA's current vehicle for launching astronauts.
Twitter is the current official name of the social platform owned by X Corp.
The United Kingdom is currently a member state of the European Union.
Pluto is currently classified as a full planet of the Solar System.
Internet Explorer is currently Microsoft's flagship web browser.
Tokyo is currently the capital of Japan.
The euro is currently the official currency of Germany.
There are currently eight recognised planets in the Solar System.
English is currently one of the official languages of Canada.
